allow: PowerShell(npm install)
PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "public\\images")
PowerShell(Copy-Item "Images\\outisde.jpeg" "public\\images\\practice-outside.jpeg")
PowerShell(Copy-Item "Images\\front desk.jpeg" "public\\images\\reception.jpeg")
PowerShell(Copy-Item "Images\\waiting area.jpeg" "public\\images\\waiting-area.jpeg")
PowerShell(Copy-Item "Images\\inside room.jpeg" "public\\images\\dispensary.jpeg")
PowerShell(Copy-Item "Images\\door.jpeg" "public\\images\\consulting-room-door.jpeg")
PowerShell(npm run build)
PowerShell(npm run start)

PowerShell($r = $null; foreach \($i in 1..10\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \($r\) { "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $checks = @\("Your family doctor in Vereeniging", "016 020 0081", "wa.me/27763598648", "Glutathione Drip", "R970", "MedicalClinic", "78 Cassandra Ave", "Sharpeville", "practice-outside", "output=embed", "Request an appointment"\); foreach \($c in $checks\) { if \($r.Content.Contains\($c\)\) { "OK  : $c" } else { "MISS: $c" } } } else { "SERVER NOT REACHABLE" })

PowerShell(try { $img = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/images/practice-outside.jpeg" -UseBasicParsing -Method Head -ErrorAction Stop; "IMAGE STATUS: $\($img.StatusCode\)" } catch { "IMAGE FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($r = $null; foreach \($i in 1..12\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } }; if \($r\) { "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; foreach \($c in @\("elfsight-app-0b269927-4294-4794-ad12-aeef39472f31", "data-elfsight-app-lazy", "Google reviews"\)\) { if \($r.Content.Contains\($c\)\) { "OK  : $c" } else { "MISS: $c" } }; $idx = $r.Content.IndexOf\("elfsight-app"\); $heroIdx = $r.Content.IndexOf\("Special rates for pensioners"\); $servicesIdx = $r.Content.IndexOf\("Comprehensive Medical Services"\); "Widget after offers strip: $\($idx -gt $heroIdx\); before services: $\($idx -lt $servicesIdx\)" } else { "SERVER NOT REACHABLE" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $procIds = $conns.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $procIds\) { Get-Process -Id $p | Select-Object Id, ProcessName; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -Confirm:$false }; "Stopped process\(es\): $procIds" } else { "Nothing listening on 3000" })
PowerShell("cleared")
PowerShell(npm run dev)

PowerShell($r = $null; foreach \($i in 1..20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000 } }; if \($r\) { "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $cssMatch = [regex]::Match\($r.Content, 'href="\(/_next/static/css/[^"]+\)"'\); if \($cssMatch.Success\) { $cssUrl = "http://localhost:3000" + $cssMatch.Groups[1].Value; $css = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $cssUrl -UseBasicParsing; "CSS STATUS: $\($css.StatusCode\), length: $\($css.Content.Length\)"; if \($css.Content.Contains\("--color-sky"\) -or $css.Content.Contains\(".bg-slate-900"\)\) { "CSS: Tailwind classes present" } else { "CSS: WARNING content unexpected" } } else { "NO CSS LINK FOUND" }; if \($r.Content.Contains\("elfsight-app-0b269927"\)\) { "WIDGET: present" } } else { "SERVER NOT REACHABLE" })

PowerShell($r = $null; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 -ErrorAction Stop; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; foreach \($c in @\("Complete Medical Care", "[01]", "Book a Visit", "Antenatal Checkups", "Clinical IV Therapy"\)\) { if \($r.Content.Contains\($c\)\) { "OK  : $c" } else { "MISS: $c" } } } catch { "REQUEST FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $m = [regex]::Match\($r.Content, '.{20}01.{20}'\); if \($m.Success\) { "FOUND: $\($m.Value\)" } else { "01 not found at all" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $m = [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, '\\[<!-- -->\\d\\d<!-- -->\\]'\); "Card numbers found: $\($m.Count\)"; $m2 = [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, 'General Medicine|Miscarriage Management'\); "Service names found: $\($m2.Count\)")

PowerShell($r = $null; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90 -ErrorAction Stop; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; foreach \($c in @\("Questions We Get Often", "Still have a question?", "Make a Call", "FAQPage", "Do I need an appointment", "bg-brand-950", "bg-cream-50", "text-brand-100"\)\) { if \($r.Content.Contains\($c\)\) { "OK : $c" } else { "MISS: $c" } }; if \($r.Content -match "slate-"\) { "WARN: leftover slate- classes in HTML" } else { "OK : no slate- classes left" } } catch { "REQUEST FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $idx = $r.Content.IndexOf\("slate-"\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { $r.Content.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$idx-120\), 260\) } else { "no slate- found" })
PowerShell(\(Get-Content "node_modules\\lucide-react\\package.json" | ConvertFrom-Json\).version; Test-Path "node_modules\\lucide-react\\dist\\esm\\icons\\user.js")

PowerShell($r = $null; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90 -ErrorAction Stop; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; foreach \($c in @\("Why Choose Us", "Your Health Matters Most", "Rated 4.9/5 by Our Patients", "Special Rates & Discounts", "Our Team", "Dr M. E. Mukanzila", "Dr Kala", "General Practitioner", "waiting-area"\)\) { if \($r.Content.Contains\($c\)\) { "OK  : $c" } else { "MISS: $c" } } } catch { "REQUEST FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($h = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Host "aspect54:" \($h.Contains\("lg:aspect-[5/4]"\)\); Write-Host "aspect65:" \($h.Contains\("xl:aspect-[6/5]"\)\); Write-Host "grid-cols-2:" \($h.Contains\("lg:grid-cols-2 lg:gap-14"\)\); $i = $h.IndexOf\("Your General Practitioner"\); Write-Host \($h.Substring\($i - 60, 300\) -replace "<!-- -->",""\))

PowerShell($h = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Host "STATUS OK, len $\($h.Length\)"; Write-Host "subhead-gone:" \(-not $h.Contains\("no appointment needed. We accept"\)\); Write-Host "book-online-gone:" \(-not $h.Contains\("Book Online"\)\); Write-Host "bullets-gone:" \(-not $h.Contains\("4.9 / 5.0 Rating"\)\); Write-Host "mobile-img:" \($h.Contains\("lg:hidden"\) -and \($h -split "practice-outside"\).Count - 1\); Write-Host "desktop-img-hidden-on-mobile:" \($h.Contains\("relative hidden w-full lg:block"\)\))

PowerShell($h = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Host "STATUS OK"; foreach \($t in @\('class="text-center lg:text-left"','justify-start overflow-hidden pt-24 sm:justify-center','max-w-2xl text-center sm:text-left','max-w-2xl mb-12 text-center sm:text-left','text-center font-display text-3xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-brand-950 sm:text-4xl lg:text-left','mt-10 text-left','p-7 text-left','py-8 sm:px-6 lg:grid-cols-2'\)\) { Write-Host "$\($h.Contains\($t\)\) <= $t" })

PowerShell($h = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; Write-Host "STATUS OK"; Write-Host "clamp-class:" \($h.Contains\("h-[clamp\(11rem,calc\(100vh-33rem\),30rem\)]"\)\))
